daily_summary.headline: Aurora and Launches Light Up the Sky

top_events.title: G3 Aurora Storm
top_events.description: A G3 geomagnetic storm is expected, offering aurora visibility at 52° latitude.
top_events.action: Prepare for aurora viewing and photography.

top_events.title: Zhuque-2E Block 2 Launch
top_events.description: LandSpace's Zhuque-2E Block 2 rocket will launch with an unknown payload from Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for this operational mission.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 will launch a batch of Starlink satellites from Vandenberg SFB.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for this operational mission.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
